description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rocker/tidyverse:latest Docker image and a CODECOV_TOKEN variable. Define a single deploy stage with a pages job that runs an apt update and installs libssl-dev, libssh2-1-dev, libxml2-dev, libcurl4-gnutls-dev, libgit2-dev, libmagick++-dev, pandoc, pandoc-citeproc, libudunits2-dev, and libgdal-dev in before_script. In the script it executes Rscript -e 'install.packages("pkgdown")', then Rscript -e 'devtools::install_deps(dependencies = TRUE)', then Rscript -e 'remotes::install_gitlab("dickoa/rhdx")', and finally Rscript -e 'pkgdown::build_site(override = list(destination = "public"))'. After the script it runs Rscript -e 'covr::package_coverage()' and Rscript -e 'covr::codecov()' in after_script, and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact.
